text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>In Herrn Johan Pistorischen Buchdruckerey zu St. Elizabeth zu haben, in Teutscher als Frantzösicher Sprach, <BIBL><TITLE>die Antwort auf das wider Ihro Kayserl. Majestät ausgegebene Spannische Manifest, worinnen enthalten, was Ihro Cathol. Majest. bewogen dem Kayser den Krieg anzukündanden; aus obiger Antwort aber dessen trifftige Widerlegung zu sehen ist</TITLE></BIBL>, das Stuck <PRIZE>6. xr.</PRIZE></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":4,"explanation":"The original XML contained several structural and character-encoding errors typical of digitized early modern German texts. 1. Fixed a nesting error where a closing </TITLE> tag appeared inside the <BIBL> block after the content had already been closed by a redundant </TITLE> tag. 2. Corrected the broken Unicode character sequences (e.g., 'St. El√übethen' to 'St. Elizabeth') which were likely artifacts of a faulty OCR or encoding conversion. 3. parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>In Herrn Johan Pistorischen Buchdruckerey zu St. Elizabeth zu haben, in Teutscher als Frantzösicher Sprach, <BIBL><TITLE>die Antwort auf das wider Ihro Kayserl. Majestät ausgegebene Spannische Manifest, worinnen enthalten, was Ihro Cathol. Majest. bewogen dem Kayser den Krieg anzukündanden; aus obiger Antwort aber dessen trifftige Widerlegung zu sehen ist</TITLE></BIBL>, das Stuck <PRIZE>6. xr.</PRIZE></ITEM>
parsed.explanation: The original XML contained several structural and character-encoding errors typical of digitized early modern German texts. 1. Fixed a nesting error where a closing </TITLE> tag appeared inside the <BIBL> block after the content had already been closed by a redundant </TITLE> tag. 2. Corrected the broken Unicode character sequences (e.g., 'St. El√übethen' to 'St. Elizabeth') which were likely artifacts of a faulty OCR or encoding conversion. 3. Removed the stray '$√†$' symbol which acted as a broken delimiter. 4. Reorganized the sentence structure within the <ITEM> tag to ensure the bibliographic information is logically contained within the <BIBL><TITLE> hierarchy without overlapping tags.
